changelog: Expanded Platform Support: You can now easily add and manage games from Steam, Epic Games, and GOG.
Unified App Management: We’ve simplified the interface. The separate MS Store button is gone – now all your apps, regardless of their source, are neatly organized under the "Installed" tab.
Smart Monitoring: The launch countdown is now even more intuitive. If you manually close all applications in a profile before the timer finishes, the countdown will automatically cancel itself.
New Visual Identity: Enjoy a fresh look with our brand-new logo and application icon.
UI Scaling Overhaul: We’ve completely rebuilt the window scaling system. This fixes the issue where the interface appeared "cut off" on certain screen resolutions or DPI settings.
Fixed: Temporarily disabled apps in a profile now correctly display as "grayed out" after the profile is launched.
Performance: Various under-the-top improvements for a smoother and faster experience.
Stability: General code cleanup and minor bug fixes reported by the community.
